name: Arizona Balloon Classic
highlight: Arizona's premier balloon festival near Phoenix.
details: Features morning launches, evening balloon glows, food vendors, and family entertainment in the Phoenix metro area.

name: Page Lake Powell Balloon Regatta
highlight: Colorful balloons launch above Lake Powell and red rock cliffs.
details: One of the most scenic balloon events in Arizona, offering incredible views of Lake Powell and the surrounding desert landscape.

name: Eyes to the Sky Balloon Festival
highlight: Beautiful mountain valley launches and family activities.
details: A favorite Utah balloon festival featuring launches, entertainment, and activities in a picturesque valley setting.

name: Albuquerque International Balloon Fiesta
highlight: The largest balloon festival in the world.
details: Hundreds of balloons launch simultaneously during the famous Mass Ascension events.

name: Panguitch Valley Balloon Rally
highlight: Balloons launch near Bryce Canyon Country.
details: Offers beautiful sunrise launches and a small-town festival atmosphere.

name: Colorado Springs Labor Day Lift Off
highlight: Rocky Mountain views and mass ascensions.
details: Balloons rise against the backdrop of Pikes Peak and the Rocky Mountains.

name: Great Reno Balloon Race
highlight: One of the world's largest free ballooning events.
bestFor: Large balloon launches and family events
details: Known for its Dawn Patrol and Glow Show, this event attracts pilots and spectators from around the world.

name: National Balloon Classic
details: Features balloon races, special shape balloons, and evening balloon glows throughout the week.

name: Temecula Valley Balloon and Wine Festival
highlight: Combines ballooning, wine, and live entertainment.
details: Visitors enjoy hot air balloons alongside concerts, local wineries, and food vendors.

name: Adirondack Balloon Festival
highlight: Scenic launches in the Adirondack Mountains.
details: One of the largest balloon festivals in the Northeast with beautiful autumn backdrops.

name: Plano Balloon Festival
highlight: Community festival with balloon launches and entertainment.
details: Features balloon launches, fireworks, concerts, and activities for children.

name: Carolina BalloonFest
highlight: One of the longest-running balloon festivals in the Southeast.
details: Includes tethered rides, balloon launches, live music, and local vendors.

name: QuickChek New Jersey Festival of Ballooning
highlight: Large-scale balloon festival with concerts and special shapes.
details: Combines balloon launches with major entertainment acts and family attractions.

name: Great Forest Park Balloon Race
highlight: Historic balloon race held in Forest Park.
details: A long-running tradition featuring competitive balloon races and family activities.

name: Bristol International Balloon Fiesta
details: Features mass ascents, night glows, and balloon pilots from around the world.
